title: [IOS]Analytics - Feedback Opened
scenario: Analytics events logged when opening Feedback form (Mopinion) in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Open the app menu (e.g., hamburger menu or overflow menu).
4. Select 'Feedback' or 'Send Feedback' to open the Mopinion feedback form.
5. Observe the analytics/logging data that is captured upon opening the form.
expected: The following default analytics elements are logged when the Feedback form is opened: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment. Event counts update after a few hours.
